Telemetry._comment: AI-lifecycle observability (issue 0017). Metadata (model/tokens/latency/tool names) is always captured. Set CaptureContent true per environment to also capture prompt/response content, which passes through the redaction hook before export. Default off for this intimate-journal domain.

ChatModels._comment: BYO OpenAI-compatible endpoint for AI Cleanup (ADR-0004). Set Provider/Endpoint/ApiKey/Model.
